title: Scottish archaeologists to explore castle cave once home to ancient hippo
description: ARCHAEOLOGISTS are set to delve deeper into a “truly remarkable” Welsh cave that was once home to a hippopotamus that roamed the country 120,000 years ago ...

title: Further digs to take place at ‘remarkable’ cave once home to ancient hippo
description: Researchers said the excavations could provide insights into past climate change and extinct species

title: Terrifying ancient croc cousin that chased prey on land discovered after almost 80 years hidden away in museum basement
description: EXPERTS have uncovered an ancient cousin to the crocodile that had a terrifyingly different approach to hunting. The newly-identified relative has been discovered hiding in plain sight among a haul of fossils dumped in a draw in the basement of a museum for almost 80 years. "It was in the basement of the Peabody Museum...

title: Navigating the Past with Ancient Stone Compass Needles - eos.org

title: Josie Hall’s Arresting Photos Invoke the Ancient Japanese Art of Kendo
description: Inspired by the controlled chaos and energy of this ancient martial art, Red Patience explores an outsider’s experience of the mores and contradictions of Japanese culture
